description.overview: Named for their beautiful mottled blue coat, Blueticks are devoted, athletic hunting dogs who make loving family companions.
description.history: The Bluetick Coonhound originated in United States.
description.temperament: Known for being friendly, intelligent, devoted.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, glossy, dense coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Named for their beautiful mottled blue coat, Blueticks are devoted, athletic hunting dogs who make loving family companions.
